---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug in Cost Center & Budget Control
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

- Odoo version: [e.g. 18.0-20260421]
- Module version: [e.g. 18.0.1.0.0]
- Database: [e.g. PostgreSQL 16]
- Python: [e.g. 3.11]
- Installation method: [e.g. Docker, source]

## Module Configuration

- Budget control mode: [e.g. blocking / warning_only]
- Warning threshold: [e.g. 70%]
- Blocking threshold: [e.g. 100%]
- Multi-company: [yes / no]
- Demo data installed: [yes / no]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here, such as:
- Related log output from `docker compose logs odoo --tail=200`
- Traceback if available
- Steps you've already tried

## Checklist

- [ ] I have tested with the latest module version
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have included reproduction steps
- [ ] I have included relevant log output
